description: Please analyze the attached image and identify the emergency situation.
summary: Heavy flooding reported on a street in Coimbatore, impacting vehicular traffic with several cars and a scooter navigating through high water levels. Immediate action is required to manage the situation and ensure public safety.

description: A streetlight near a residential road is flickering intermittently. There are no exposed wires, no sparks, no fire, no injuries, and no immediate danger to the public. The streetlight needs routine inspection and maintenance.
summary: Report of a flickering streetlight near a residential road requiring routine inspection and maintenance. No immediate hazards, injuries, or public danger reported.

description: A portion of an old residential building has collapsed near Ukkadam. Two people may be trapped under the debris and several others are injured. Cracks are visible in the remaining structure and there is a risk of further collapse. Immediate rescue and ambulance assistance are required.
summary: Emergency response required for a building collapse near Ukkadam with potential trapped individuals and multiple injuries. Risk of further structural failure.

description: A streetlight near a residential road is flickering intermittently. There are no exposed wires, no fire, no injuries, and no immediate danger to the public. The streetlight needs inspection and maintenance.
summary: Report of fire breakout with visible smoke and immediate hazards detected.

description: Rainwater has accumulated on one side of a residential street after heavy rainfall. The water level is low, no houses are flooded, and no people are trapped or injured. Vehicles can still pass through the road slowly. Assistance is needed to clear the blocked drainage.
summary: Urban flooding with rising water levels and localized safety risks.

description: A car and a bike collided near RS Puram signal. Two people are seriously injured and one person is unconscious. Traffic is blocked. Immediate ambulance and police assistance is required.
summary: Critical patient report exhibiting severe medical distress requiring immediate life support.

description: A major fire has broken out in a commercial building near Gandhipuram bus stand. Heavy smoke and flames are coming from the second floor. Several people may still be trapped inside the building and one person is reportedly injured. The fire is spreading quickly to nearby shops. Immediate fire and ambulance assistance is required.
summary: Report of fire breakout with visible smoke and immediate hazards detected.

description: Huge fire broke out in the local textile warehouse. Thick black smoke everywhere. Looks like a major electrical short circuit. Some workers might be on the upper floors.
summary: Critical warehouse fire with smoke spread and potential trapped casualties, suspected electrical hazard origins.

description: Two-car high-speed collision on the highway near the flyover. One car flipped over. Passengers are injured and unable to get out of the car. Urgent medical attention required.
summary: High-severity traffic collision involving vehicular rollover and multiple trapped/injured occupants.

description: The main high-voltage electric transformer pole in our street is sparking heavily after the storm. Sparks are flying onto nearby dry trees. Fear of secondary fire.
summary: Transformer arcing following a storm posing secondary brush fire hazards and electrical network risks.

description: Heavy rain has caused major street flooding. Water is entering the ground floor houses in our low-lying area. Seniors are stuck and need transport assistance to relief camps.
summary: Monsoon street flooding inundating residential ground floors, requiring active evacuations for elderly citizens.

description: Elderly gentleman collapsed at the park while jogging. He is unconscious and breathing very shallowly. We have called for help, starting bystander CPR.
summary: Sudden cardiac arrest / unconscious state in public park, active bystander CPR being performed.
